name: GolfX
about: GolfX is an indoor golf center in Franklin, Massachusetts, featuring five state-of-the-art golf simulators and a full pro shop offering regripping and repair services. The venue provides a private, judgment-free experience with rooms for each simulator, catering to golfers looking for affordable, high-quality practice and play. In 2024, a members-only private bay was built with extended hours and the latest technology. The facility also hosts leagues and offers a premium suite for larger groups and special events, equipped with amenities like a pool table, refrigerator, and 70-inch 4K TV for watching sports.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium suite with extra amenities for groups
Access to Uneekor QED and GSPro technology
Affordable hourly pricing with friend-friendly bookings
Members-only bay with extended hours and advanced tech

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed; refrigerator available in premium suite
BYOB allowed; refrigerator available in premium suite

simulator_hardware.notes: Hyper-speed camera system providing accuracy from 10cm to 435 yards

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB is allowed; the premium suite is equipped with a refrigerator for storing food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies based on the number of players and simulator usage, as bookings are made by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, there is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or features on the website.
